items.statcast_observation: Carter Jensen produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 111.5 mph at a 16.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals beat the Texas Rangers, KC 5, TEX 3. Jac Caglianone led the night, 3-3 | 2 HR, BB, 3 RBI in the latest Royals game. Carter Jensen supplied the loudest Royals contact at 111.5 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Rangers Recap
